name: Service Binary Path Update Followed by Network Connection
notes: This rule triggers when a service binary path is updated and a network connection is initiated by the same process.
bb_references: BB: Process created a Network Connection
BB: Process created a Network Connection match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match with the same Source IP
BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001840) Network connection detected, (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)
when BB: Process created a Network Connection match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match with the same Source IP, Process Name (custom)
thresholds: when BB: Process created a Network Connection match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match with the same Source IP, Process Name (custom)
TD_list: APPLY Service Binary Path Update Followed by Network Connection on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001840) Network connection detected, (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

AND when BB: Process created a Network Connection match at least 1 times in 30 minutes after any of BB: Service Binary Path Has Been Set or Updated match with the same Source IP, Process Name (custom)
RED_list: Event name: Service Binary Path Has Been Updated Followed by a Network Connection From the Same Process
Event description: Service Binary Path Has Been Updated Followed by a Network Connection From the Same Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
